method_summary: Conceptual analysis of XAI challenges for BLV users, identifying the modality gap and proposing accessible XAI approaches
key_innovation: Identification of the 'modality gap' in XAI for BLV users and the 'Self-Blame Bias' phenomenon
title: Explainable AI for Blind and Low-Vision Users: Navigating Trust, Modality, and Interpretability in the Agentic Era
